brandTitle: Hair you love, care you trust.
brandSubtitle: Color, perm, cut and care — book online, shop salon products, visit us in Macau.
storyBody:
n_nsalon (藝能美髮培訓中心) is a professional hair and training studio rooted in Macau. We welcome clients who expect careful consultation, strong technical work, and looks that are easy to live in day to day. Our team brings together color, perm and cut expertise with a focus on scalp and strand health — in the salon, and with products you can take home.

Whether you are refreshing your style or looking for a reliable routine, we are here to help with clarity, craft, and care.
serviceCutBody: From classic shapes to precision cutting and styling that suits your face and texture.
serviceTechBody: Balayage, colour and correction, perms, Brazilian blow out, keratin smoothing — always matched to your hair condition.
serviceCareBody: Salon-grade shampoo, treatments, and styling support — pick up what suits your hair between visits, with guidance from our team.
shopBannerBody: Salon-grade shampoo, conditioner, and treatments — continue your care between visits.
bookingFlow: Choose a service and time, leave your contact — we will confirm as soon as we can.
priceListBody: In-salon service pricing is available on request. Contact us for the latest menu, packages, or training course fees.
shopSectionNote: Salon care for home. In Macau: MPay, bank transfer, UEPAY, or cards via Stripe.
shopSortPriceAsc: Sort by price: low to high
shopSortPriceDesc: Sort by price: high to low
shopNoProducts: No products available at the moment.
address: RUA MITRA NO.29 A R/C MACAU
hoursDetail:
Open Mon, Tue, Thu–Sun · 11:00–20:00
Closed on Wednesday
footerTagline: Therapy is expensive, get a haircut instead — we’re great listeners.
whatsappBubbleBody: Chat with us. The team typically replies in a few minutes.
